bodyText: Local pickup in Arlington, VA. Custom orders + event boxes available. Always made fresh, never frozen.

At 703 bakehouse, everything is made fresh from my home kitchen with real ingredients, extra care, and a whole lot of heart. From rich, chocolatey s’mores bars to soft snickerdoodles and indulgent cookies & cream cupcakes, each treat is thoughtfully crafted to bring a little joy to your day.  Whether you’re celebrating something sweet or just treating yourself, I offer small-batch, made-to-order baked goods that taste like home—with options for gluten-free and dairy-free diets, too.
headerText: Baked from scratch. Shared with love.
